arts.ttl: Exeter City Women keep Devon red with another win over Plymouth Argyle
arts.sum: Imogen Crawford thought she had given Argyle the lead when her hopeful lofted ball into the area came crashing off the crossbar, before Taylor pulled off a heroic goal-line clearance to ensure City did not fall behind early on. Exeter City Women ensured Devon remained Red with three wins out of three against Plymouth Argyle this season, thanks to Sophie Gillies’ second half strike.
